creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
The freebsd-binup list was to have been retired as of Nov 2010.
	(Ref.  <http://docs.FreeBSD.org/cgi/mid.cgi?20101101140613.GA9354>.)

	We (postmaster@) are finally(!) getting around to this.

Fix: This should come close.  It's based on a working copy of
	doc/head as of r39631.
How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
